target: 3. What's the Answer?
…Oh!
Welcome back, Mio.
S-Shinpei...? Why are you here?
Sou called. He said he was worried since you came back alone, and asked me to go pick you up.
Sou? ...I'm fine, really.
Can't be helped. You are a girl, after all.
(Because I'm a girl...)
Then, Shin-chan too?
Huh?
You were worried about me too, Shin-chan?
Of course…
You're like a sister to me, Mio. Of course I'd worry about family, right?

…A sister, huh?
Well, that makes sense.
Well, let's head back. I'll make curry when we get home.
You'll be surprised when you eat it. Today's curry is my masterpiece.
Wow, it turned out that well? Because you made it with my sister?
No, no, that's definitely not it. While we were cooking, Ushio kept messing with me and holding me back.
But it was fun, right?

Ah, yeah… I guess that's true.
At least it wasn't boring.
Hehe, is that so.

…Mio?
What's wrong?
Thanks, Shin-chan.
...So you heard it from Tokiko after all.

Yeah.
Because I was acting strange,
you were worried about me, right?

Ah… yeah.
But seeing your face when you came back made me feel better.
I don't know what you and Tokiko talked about, but you look like you've moved past whatever it was.
Ah…

You really do notice things,
don't you, Shin-chan…
And yet, you can't seem to notice the important things.
The important stuff… what are you talking about?
…You're curious?
Well… yeah.
I'd hate to mess up without noticing anything and end up regretting it.
I see…

But if you don't want to say it,
you don't have to.

Yeah.
I didn't really want to say it.
If you had noticed, and then told me yourself――
Juuust kidding.
Geez, I'm done with that. I'm going to stop standing still and move forward.
How do I put this... I'm sorry I didn't notice all those things.
There's no need to apologize. I was just getting my hopes up on my own.
Then, will you listen?
Yeah.

S-sorry.
Wait a second…
What is this... I'm so nervous...
Calm down... I decided I was going to move forward.

I'm okay now.
Are you ready, Shin-chan?
Yeah.
(Oh no... I'm not okay at all!)
(Asking him 'Are you ready?' and I'm still hesitating...)
(But... I can't stop here!)
(I have to be brave!)
Shin-chan, I…
I like you, Shin-chan. I really love you.
Huh…?
What?!
M-Me? Huh... A-Are you seriously saying that to me?!
Who else is there? I clearly said 'Shin-chan'.
But why me?!
There are tons of guys out there who are cooler and smarter than me...!
Why would you go out of your way for someone like me, who has no real redeeming qualities――
Alright, that's enough!
Even if you are Shin-chan himself, can you please not make fun of the Shin-chan I fell for?
S-Sorry... But really, someone like me...
To begin with, don't get all flustered just because someone like me confessed to you.
No, wait a second! You shouldn't say 'someone like me' either!
Huh?
O-Of course I'd be flustered if you said something like that to me...
And so suddenly too... I just, don't know how to react...
Then, when was I supposed to say it?
Ugh...
It must be sudden for you, Shin-chan. But it's not sudden at all for me. If anything, I think I did a good job keeping quiet until now.
Because this feeling hasn't changed since a long, long time ago.
I-I see...
Ahaha! Shin-chan, your face is bright red.
D-Don't tease me...
Then let me hear your answer properly. If you forgot, should I say it again?
Huh, wait――
I like you, Shin-chan! I really love you!
There! Now Shin-chan, your answer!?
E-Eeehhhhh~!?
Key TIPS [<color=#GF_KEY_EPILOGIE_MIO>epilogue: Mio Kofune</color>] obtained.
